## Description
Describe the changes made in this PR. Include motivation and context.

## Linked Issues
Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Hardware Fix (PCB/Schematic)
- [ ] Hardware Improvement / New Feature
- [ ] Firmware/Software Bug Fix
- [ ] Firmware/Software New Feature
- [ ] Documentation Update

## Checklist

### Hardware Review
- [ ] **DRC/ERC Passed:** All Design Rule Checks and Electrical Rule Checks are green.
- [ ] **3D Models:** All new components have correct 3D footprints.
- [ ] **BOM Updated:** Bill of Materials is updated and parts are available.
- [ ] **Manufacturing Files:** Gerbers/NC Drill files generated and verified in a viewer.

### Software Review
- [ ] **Compiles:** Code builds without errors or significant warnings.
- [ ] **Tests:** Unit tests/Integration tests passed (if applicable).
- [ ] **Formatting:** Code follows the project's style guidelines (e.g., clang-format).
- [ ] **Documentation:** New code is documented.

## Screenshots / Attachments
Add any relevant screenshots (3D PCB view, scope captures, logic analyzer logs).
